resources.string: Please shake to prophesy your fortune.
** This is a personal belief. Please use your discretion when making a prediction. **

string-array.name: predictions
string-array.item: Card 1 : Good fortune is on your way.\nBe alert and seize every opportunity that comes your way. You will find success in your ventures.
Card 2 : Success is near.\nStay focused and diligent, and you will overcome any obstacles. Your hard work will pay off soon.
Card 3 : Be cautious with your health.\nPay attention to your diet and exercise regularly. Your well-being should be your top priority.
Card 4 : A big change is coming.\nEmbrace new experiences and take calculated risks. This change will lead to positive results.
Card 5 : Love is in the air.\nYou may meet someone special soon. Keep your heart open and be ready for a new beginning.
Card 6: Financial stability ahead\nYour hard work is about to pay off. Expect a period of financial growth and stability soon.
Card 7: Overcoming obstacles\nThe challenges you are facing now will soon pass. Stay strong, and you will emerge victorious.
Card 8: A journey awaits\nA trip or adventure is on the horizon. This journey will bring new experiences and growth.
Card 9: Harmony and balance\nFocus on bringing balance into your life. Once you achieve peace within, everything else will follow smoothly.
